list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND model != '' ORDER BY model

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, model, quantile(0.95)(total_latency_ms) AS p95 FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND model IN ($model) GROUP BY time, model ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, model, avg(total_latency_ms) AS avg_ms FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND model IN ($model) GROUP BY time, model ORDER BY time

SELECT model, avg(model_load_latency_ms) AS load_ms, avg(prompt_eval_latency_ms) AS prompt_eval_ms, avg(generation_latency_ms) AS generation_ms, avg(context_build_latency_ms) AS context_ms FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event IN ('request_completed', 'request_completed') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND model IN ($model) GROUP BY model ORDER BY load_ms + prompt_eval_ms + generation_ms DESC

SELECT model, avg(prompt_tokens_per_second) AS prompt_tps, avg(generation_tokens_per_second) AS gen_tps FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND generation_tokens_per_second > 0 AND model IN ($model) GROUP BY model ORDER BY gen_tps DESC

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, model, countIf(cold_start = 1) AS cold_starts FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, model HAVING cold_starts > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, model, avg(prompt_eval_latency_ms) AS first_token_ms FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND prompt_eval_latency_ms > 0 AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, model ORDER BY time
SELECT model_load_latency_ms FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND model_load_latency_ms > 0 AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND model IN ($model)

SELECT prompt_eval_latency_ms, generation_latency_ms, model FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND prompt_eval_latency_ms > 0 AND generation_latency_ms > 0 AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime LIMIT 500
